name: Pasta Fagioli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Tsp Salt (less if beans are salty)
1 Cup Small Whole Wheat Shells or Macaroni
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 5-quart pot over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and sauté for 3 minutes until fragrant.
3. Stir in onion and celery; cook for another 2-3 minutes until softened.
4. Pour in tomato juice and water; bring to a simmer.
5. Stir in the tomato sauce, beans, bay leaves, oregano, basil, garlic salt, and black pepper. Adjust seasoning as needed.
6. Cover and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Add pasta and return to a boil. Reduce heat and cover again; cook until pasta is tender, about 10 more minutes.
8. Stir in spinach and continue cooking for another 5 minutes until wilted.
9. Taste and adjust salt if necessary.
10. Serve hot with grated Parmesan cheese on the side.
